name: Elathain's Soulraid
inspire: Inspire each friendly fighter at the start of the second battle round. Uninspire each friendly fighter at the start of the third battle round.

reactions.name: Flood Tide
reactions.trigger: In the first battle round, immediately after an enemy fighter's melee Attack,
reactions.rulesText: give the attacker a Stagger token.

reactions.name: Riptide Harpoon
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after picking Tammael to Charge.
reactions.flavorText: Even a lowly Thrall such as Tammael is trained to fight with the fury of a surging wave.
reactions.rulesText: That fighter's melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have +1 Attack dice for that Charge.

reactions.name: Soul Harvest
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by your leader ({icon:leader}) with a non-Upgrade weapon if a friendly Tammael is slain.
reactions.flavorText: It is through stolen souls that the Idoneth sustain their cursed civilisation.
reactions.rulesText: Raise that friendly Tammael and place them in a starting hex in friendly territory.

reactions.name: Ethersea Predators
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly Idoneth ({icon:destined}) uses a Core ability.
reactions.flavorText: It's always the one you don't see that gets you.
reactions.rulesText: Push each friendly minion ({icon:minion}) 1 hex closer to that fighter.

reactions.name: Phantasmal Forms
reactions.trigger: Immediately after the Determine Success step of a successful Attack that targets a friendly Fuirann,
reactions.flavorText: Even Akhelian nobles such as Fuirann will use illusion and trickery to avoid the brute enemy.
reactions.rulesText: that friendly Fuirann can use Stand Fast. You can only use this ability once per battle round.

abilities.name: High Tide
abilities.rulesText: In the second battle round, friendly fighters have +1 Move.

abilities.name: Ebb Tide
abilities.rulesText: In the third battle round, friendly fighters' melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have Grapple ({icon:fury}).
